## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and challenges in developing Vapi's first pSEO page, and plan next steps for timely completion.](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Project scope larger than initially thought; additional dev resource needed, especially for design/styling](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Timeline pressure due to client expectations for rapid, high-quality delivery](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Current bottleneck: converting Figma designs to Tailwind CSS, slowing overall progress](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Plan to soft-launch page for SEO benefits, pending client approval](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

## Topics

### Project Scope and Challenges

  - [Extensive checklist of tasks, including new functionalities (e.g., audio player) and UI design implementation](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Major challenge: converting Figma designs to Tailwind CSS framework manually - time-consuming process](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Concern about meeting high client expectations for speed and quality simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Need for additional developer identified, especially for design/styling tasks](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Development Progress and Priorities

  - [Marcus focusing solely on this project currently](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Functionality (e.g., audio player) deemed manageable, main concern is perfecting design/styling](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Exploring AI tools to assist in Figma to Tailwind conversion, but still requires manual review](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Voice agent feature built by Kirkland needs review for adequacy](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Timeline and Resource Allocation

  - [Marcus working full day tomorrow (May 14, 2025) to progress as much as possible](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Internal sync scheduled for 1 PM CET (2 PM Lithuania time) to review progress](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Branko to meet client at 7 PM CET (8 PM Lithuania time) to show current state and discuss publication preferences](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Seeking additional developer support, at least for this week](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Client Expectations and Publication Strategy

  - [Client paying significant amount, expecting fast work and perfect results](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Preference to avoid showing incomplete work to prevent unproductive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Considering soft launch strategy: publish early for SEO benefits, continue perfecting post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Anticipating detailed code review from Henry (client's developer) due to well-organized, detailed codebase](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcus to continue focus on functionality and styling improvements](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Branko to request additional developer resource from Daniel via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Internal sync meeting scheduled for May 14, 1 PM CET to review progress](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Branko to meet with client on May 14, 7 PM CET to show current state and discuss publication strategy](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Decision to be made on publication state based on client meeting outcome](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Prepare for potential code review and feedback from client's developer (Henry)](https://fathom.video/share/3vzjbyxq2gkcMWgzdu6a9E9Q4cjgpdCw?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
